entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by the shoot fly

entities.name: ATHERIGONA SOCCATA
entities.description: The sorghum shoot fly, a significant pest in Asia, Africa, and Mediterranean Europe

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where Atherigona soccata is a pest

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where Atherigona soccata is a pest

entities.name: MEDITERRANEAN EUROPE
entities.description: A region where Atherigona soccata is a pest

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist attack by a pest

entities.name: RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide resistance to pests

entities.name: ANTIXENOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance where the plant is non-attractive to the pest

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance that adversely affects the biology of the pest

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand pest attack without significant yield loss

entities.name: SFCR 151
entities.description: A shoot fly-resistant sorghum genotype

entities.name: ICSV 705
entities.description: A shoot fly-resistant sorghum genotype

entities.name: SFCR 125
entities.description: A shoot fly-resistant sorghum genotype

entities.name: IS 18551
entities.description: A shoot fly-resistant sorghum genotype

entities.name: SWARNA
entities.description: A shoot fly-susceptible sorghum genotype used as a check

entities.name: DEADHEARTS
entities.description: The drying of the central leaf of a sorghum plant caused by shoot fly

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE TILLERS
entities.description: The number of tillers that produce grain

entities.name: LARVAL PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the larval stage of the shoot fly

entities.name: LARVAL SURVIVAL
entities.description: The percentage of larvae that survive to the next stage

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The percentage of larvae that successfully emerge as adults

entities.name: GROWTH AND ADULT EMERGENCE INDICES
entities.description: Indices measuring the growth and emergence of the pest

entities.name: LEAF GLOSSINESS
entities.description: The shine of the leaf surface, associated with resistance

entities.name: TRICHOME DENSITY
entities.description: The density of hairs on the leaf surface, associated with resistance

entities.name: PLUMULE PIGMENTATION
entities.description: The color of the plumule, associated with resistance

entities.name: LEAF SHEATH PIGMENTATION
entities.description: The color of the leaf sheath, associated with resistance

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll in the leaf, associated with susceptibility

entities.name: LEAF SURFACE WETNESS
entities.description: The moisture level on the leaf surface, associated with susceptibility

entities.name: SEEDLING VIGOR
entities.description: The health and growth rate of the seedling, associated with susceptibility

entities.name: WAXY BLOOM
entities.description: The waxy coating on the leaf, associated with susceptibility

entities.name: STEP-WISE REGRESSION
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify the most significant predictors of a trait

entities.name: CORRELATION COEFFICIENTS
entities.description: A statistical measure of the strength of the relationship between two variables

entities.name: MULTIPLE REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical technique to model the relationship between multiple independent variables and one dependent variable
